C

CacheAware<T> - Interface in opennlp.service
Interface representing a cache-aware component for managing service and model caches.
call() - Method in class opennlp.OpenNLPServer
 
clearCaches() - Method in interface opennlp.service.CacheAware
Clears the in-memory caches for services and models.
close() - Method in class opennlp.service.PosTaggerService
Clears the in-memory caches for services and models.
close() - Method in class opennlp.service.SentenceDetectorService
Clears the in-memory caches for services and models.
close() - Method in class opennlp.service.TokenizerService
Clears the in-memory caches for services and models.

D

DirectoryModelFinder - Class in opennlp.service.classpath
The DirectoryModelFinder class is responsible for finding model files in a given directory on the classpath.
DirectoryModelFinder(String, Path, boolean) - Constructor for class opennlp.service.classpath.DirectoryModelFinder
Constructs a new DirectoryModelFinder instance.

E

ExceptionAware - Interface in opennlp.service
The ExceptionAware interface provides a mechanism for handling exceptions and returning appropriate gRPC error responses to clients.

G

getAvailableModels(OpenNLPService.Empty, StreamObserver<OpenNLPService.AvailableModels>) - Method in class opennlp.service.PosTaggerService

Returns the model cache containing ClassPathModel objects.

getModelCache() - Method in class opennlp.service.SentenceDetectorService
 
getModelCache() - Method in class opennlp.service.TokenizerService
 
getServiceCache() - Method in interface opennlp.service.CacheAware
Returns the service cache containing service objects of type T.

getServiceCache() - Method in class opennlp.service.TokenizerService
 

H

handleException(Exception, StreamObserver<?>) - Method in interface opennlp.service.ExceptionAware
Handles exceptions and sends a structured error response to the client using gRPC.

I

isReady() - Method in class opennlp.OpenNLPServer
 

M

main(String...) - Static method in class opennlp.OpenNLPServer
 
ModelAware<T> - Interface in opennlp.service
The ModelAware interface defines behavior for services that are aware of model management and provides functionalities for accessing and handling cached models.
ModelFinderUtil - Class in opennlp.service
Utility class for scanning and loading models.
ModelFinderUtil() - Constructor for class opennlp.service.ModelFinderUtil
 

O

opennlp - package opennlp
 
opennlp.service - package opennlp.service
 
opennlp.service.classpath - package opennlp.service.classpath
 
opennlp.service.exception - package opennlp.service.exception
 
OpenNLPServer - Class in opennlp
The OpenNLPServer class implements a gRPC server for providing OpenNLP-based services.
OpenNLPServer() - Constructor for class opennlp.OpenNLPServer
 

P

PosTaggerService - Class in opennlp.service
The PosTaggerService class implements a gRPC service for Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging using Apache OpenNLP models.
PosTaggerService(Map<String, String>) - Constructor for class opennlp.service.PosTaggerService
Initializes a Part-of-Speech (POS) Tagger service with the given configuration properties.

R

returnAvailableModels(StreamObserver<OpenNLPService.AvailableModels>) - Method in interface opennlp.service.ModelAware
Retrieves a list of available models from the model cache and streams them to the client.

S

sentDetect(OpenNLPService.SentDetectRequest, StreamObserver<OpenNLPService.StringList>) - Method in class opennlp.service.SentenceDetectorService
 
SentenceDetectorService - Class in opennlp.service
The SentenceDetector class implements a gRPC service for sentence detection using Apache OpenNLP models.
SentenceDetectorService(Map<String, String>) - Constructor for class opennlp.service.SentenceDetectorService
Initializes a Sentence Detector service with the given configuration properties.
sentPosDetect(OpenNLPService.SentDetectPosRequest, StreamObserver<OpenNLPService.SpanList>) - Method in class opennlp.service.SentenceDetectorService

stop() - Method in class opennlp.OpenNLPServer
 

T

tag(OpenNLPService.TagRequest, StreamObserver<OpenNLPService.StringList>) - Method in class opennlp.service.PosTaggerService

TokenizerService - Class in opennlp.service
The Tokenizer class implements a gRPC service for tokenization using Apache OpenNLP models.
TokenizerService(Map<String, String>) - Constructor for class opennlp.service.TokenizerService
Initializes a Tokenizer service with the given configuration properties.
